{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/technology-combinations/combinations/35-mega-stack-4-0-with-event-sourcing-consensus.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Комбинация 35: MEGA-STACK 4.0 with Event Sourcing & Consensus

{quote}[!TIP]{quote}
{quote}Документ содержит практические рекомендации и лучшие практики.{quote}




{quote}> Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Комбинирование технологий для новых свойств - Claude}} (корень репозитория).{quote}

----





{quote}Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Комбинирование технологий для новых свойств - Claude}} (корень репозитория).{quote}

Complete architecture combining ALL 35 combinations:

┌─ DISTRIBUTED COORDINATION ──────────────────────────┐
│ Raft: multi-agent cluster coordination │
│ Paxos: geo-replicated event store │
│ Leader election, log replication, consensus │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
↓
┌─ EVENT SOURCING LAYER ──────────────────────────────┐
│ Immutable event log (all legal actions) │
│ Time-travel queries (replay to any date) │
│ Audit trail (complete history) │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
↓
┌─ CQRS (Command/Query Separation) ───────────────────┐
│ Write Model: Commands → Events → Kafka │
│ Read Models (multiple projections): │
│ - PostgreSQL 18 async (current state, OLTP) │
│ - ClickHouse (analytics, OLAP, 100M rows/sec) │
│ - Elasticsearch (full-text search) │
│ - Graph DB (precedent links) │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
↓
┌─ STORAGE & ANALYTICS (from v3.0) ───────────────────┐
│ Event Store: Kafka + ClickHouse │
│ CRDT: P2P sync, offline-capable │
│ TimescaleDB: time-series queries │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
↓
┌─ AGENT ORCHESTRATION (from v2.0) ───────────────────┐
│ Raft cluster: distributed agents │
│ Sequential + Adversarial + Router │
│ OpenTelemetry: distributed tracing │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

New capabilities:

Event Sourcing: Complete audit trail, time-travel queries

CQRS: Multiple read models from single event stream

Consensus: Raft (multi-agent) + Paxos (geo-replication)

Fault tolerance: No single point of failure

Performance:

Event ingestion: 500k events/sec (Kafka)

Analytics: <500ms on 50M events (ClickHouse)

Consensus: <100ms leader election (Raft)

Replication: <1sec cross-datacenter (Paxos)

EXTENDED SYNTHESIS TABLE (Complete 1-35)

|| # || Components || Result ||
|| 31 || Event Sourcing + CQRS + ClickHouse || Audit-complete legal case mgmt ||
|| 32 || Raft + Multi-agent + CRDT || Consensus-based agent cluster ||
|| 33 || Event Sourcing + Kafka + ClickHouse || Real-time legal analytics ||
|| 34 || Paxos + Event Store + Multi-DC || Geo-replicated document store ||
|| 35 || ALL ABOVE || Complete distributed legal-AI ||

First implementation for Max:
Комбинация 31 (Event-Sourced Legal History) — immediate benefits:

Every action logged immutably

Time-travel: "show case status on 2024-06-15"

Audit trail for court compliance

ClickHouse analytics on event stream

Implementation:

python

h1. Events
class AntragSubmitted(BaseModel):
case_id: str
date: date
content: str

class BescheidReceived(BaseModel):
case_id: str
decision: str
deadline: date

h1. Event Store
events = [] # append-only
events.append(AntragSubmitted(...))
events.append(BescheidReceived(...))

h1. Time-travel query
def get_state_at(case_id, target_date):
return replay_events(
[e for e in events if e.date <= target_date]
)

Alternative: Комбинация 32 (Raft multi-agent) — если нужна multi-machine координация.

Продолжить поиск новых направлений или углубиться в практическую реализацию найденных комбинаций?



----

_Смотрите также:_
* [31-35-final|docs/technology-combinations/synthesis-tables/31-35-final.md]
* [04-event-sourcing-consensus|docs/technology-combinations/mega-stacks/04-event-sourcing-consensus.md]
* [33-event-sourcing-cqrs-clickhouse-analytics|docs/technology-combinations/combinations/33-event-sourcing-cqrs-clickhouse-analytics.md]
* [31-event-sourced-legal-document-history|docs/technology-combinations/combinations/31-event-sourced-legal-document-history.md]




----

_Похожие документы:_
* [31-35-final|docs/technology-combinations/synthesis-tables/31-35-final.md] (сходство 0.49)
* [04-event-sourcing-consensus|docs/technology-combinations/mega-stacks/04-event-sourcing-consensus.md] (сходство 0.41)
* [33-event-sourcing-cqrs-clickhouse-analytics|docs/technology-combinations/combinations/33-event-sourcing-cqrs-clickhouse-analytics.md] (сходство 0.36)
